verif_result.fix_hint:
Deterministic structural preflight rejected the RTL before iverilog/Verilator.
Violated rule(s): window_not_registered, readmemh_missing, readmemh_missing.
Repair the indicted construct exactly; do not touch unrelated logic.
Violations:
- [window_not_registered] Spatial conv must either instantiate line_buf_window or declare a shift-register window as 'reg [...] window [...]'. No such reg was found — a wire/assign 'window' is rebuilt combinationally every cycle, which blows up synth cones and loses the sliding-window invariant.
- [readmemh_missing] Weights must be loaded via $readmemh("<weights_path>", weights) or $readmemh("<bank_path>", weights_bank<N>) inside an initial block, OR the top-level must instantiate conv_datapath with WEIGHTS_PATH/BIAS_PATH parameters. None was found.
- [readmemh_missing] Biases must be loaded via $readmemh("<bias_path>", biases) or via conv_datapath's BIAS_PATH parameter. Neither was found.

verif_result.classifier_reason: Structural preflight caught three fixable RTL defects: (1) window declared as wire/assign instead of registered shift-register, (2) missing $readmemh for weights, (3) missing $readmemh for biases. All three are local code mistakes the Surgeon can repair without changing the contract or tiling strategy. Bus width (1536) is well within the 4096-bit cap and no resource limits were approached.
